# [High] Reflected XSS on example.com in Example Bug Bounty

## Vulnerability Details
- **Vulnerability Class:** Reflected Cross-Site Scripting (XSS)
- **Affected URL:** https://example.com/search
- **Affected Parameter:** q
- **Severity:** High

## Summary
The 'q' parameter is vulnerable to reflected XSS.

## Reproduction Steps
1. Go to https://example.com/search?q=<script>alert(1)</script>

## Proof of Concept (PoC)
Triggered an alert box in the browser.

## Impact
Session hijacking, credential theft.

## Remediation Suggestion
Implement proper output encoding.
